## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Stackblitz and GrowthX teams to discuss progress on ongoing projects and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Three main user categories identified: web design, internal tools, and mobile development](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Comparison pages strategy needs alignment with Mitchell on competitor focus vs. use case focus](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Starter kit project progressing with prompt engineering and template creation](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Content strategy for starter kit pages requires balancing SEO and usability](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

## Topics

### Data Analysis and User Categories

  - [Analyzed activity feed data provided by Stackblitz](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Created custom workflow in Airtable to parse and categorize user activities](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Identified three main user categories: web design, internal tools, and mobile development](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Aligns with KJ's previous insights on user behavior](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

### Comparison Pages Strategy

  - [Considering two approaches: Bolt vs X or Bolt vs X for Y (specific use case)](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Need to decide on targeting based on competitors or use cases](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [SEO strategy for comparison pages needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Potential to expand comparisons beyond direct competitors (e.g., Retool for internal tools)](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Starter Kit Project Progress

  - [Developing complex prompts for various use cases (e-commerce dashboard, CRM, agency websites)](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Bolt performing exceptionally well with detailed prompts compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Aiming to create 100+ templates across different categories](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Considering programmatic generation of article content based on prompts](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Content Strategy for Starter Kit Pages

  - [Debating between focus on prompt engineering vs. prompt customization tutorials](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Need to balance SEO value and usability of content](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Considering a repeatable layout: prompt explanation, customization guide, and keyword optimization](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Need to align with Mitchell on CMS setup and GitHub access](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Exploring options for hosting generated templates or using screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Category Structure for Starter Kit

  - [Main categories: Internal App, Web Design, (potentially) Mobile Apps](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Subcategories include admin/dashboard, e-commerce, SaaS, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Considering granularity of categories and features vs. full-fledged templates](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

### User Research

  - [George to cross-check template categories with customer experience data](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Mariana conducting deeper research on user feedback from Reddit and YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Align with Mitchell on comparison page strategy and technical setup](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

  - [Continue developing prompts and templates for starter kit](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Create category structure for starter kit templates](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Conduct deeper user research on Reddit and YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Begin work on editor comparisons (Cursor, Windsurf)](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Develop style guide for Bolt's tone and writing approach](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Explore CMS options for both projects](https://fathom.video/share/jYEboM-vZvKgAg1VAgZYmXSdfWsdbFyP?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
